flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Aims Community College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($1.8k → $2.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Aims Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.4k → $11.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Aims Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Aims Community College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 (57.6% → 72.2%).
